title: Christmas Ribbon, Christmas Decorations, 9.1m Soft Velvet Ribbons 63mm Xmas Tree Ribbon for Xmas Crafts, Gift Wrapping, Wreath, Top Bows, Sewing Xmas Tree Decorations (Gold)
seller_info_text: Guang Zhou San He Shi Ying Mao Yi You Xian Gong Si
features: 🌲[Packaging and Size]: You will receive a 10/6 yards/9.14/5.48 meters/360/216 inches long soft velvet wired ribbon, about 63 mm/2.48 inches wide, wired christmas ribbon long enough to meet your handmade needs.

🎀[High-quality materials]: This christmas ribbon is made of high-quality materials, soft and comfortable to touch, durable, reusable, washable, non-shrinking and non-fading. Practical soft iron wire is added on both sides for easy shaping and fixing. Enhance the gift packaging and add color to your gifts.

🎁[Perfect Christmas Ribbon]: Christmas tree ribbon adopts classic Christmas colors, which is very suitable for decorating Christmas trees, wreaths, Christmas gifts, Christmas crafts, etc. You can create a warm and festive atmosphere at home, allowing you and your family and friends to enjoy this perfect holiday.

💐[Multiple colors]: This christmas decorations ribbon is available in a variety of colors (green, red, black, white, gold, red snowflake, silver, glitter gold, rose gold), you can choose your favorite color to DIY Christmas bows, Christmas craft packaging, gift packaging, hair accessories, sewing, scrapbooking, Christmas trees, floral projects, etc.

🌲[Multi-Scene Use]: The christmas ribbon velvet excellent texture looks perfect for decorating your holiday crafts, such as gift wrapping, ribbon crafts, party decorations, bottle decorations, baking crafts, flower arranging, floral design, Christmas wreaths, Christmas tree garlands, Christmas tree bows, stairs, railings, tables, and more all handmade and sewing.
